title: Varasia squarrosa
taxonomy: Varasia squarrosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It belongs to the genus Varasia, which is part of the order Ericales. Further classification places Varasia squarrosa within the family Ericaceae, which contains a diverse range of plants commonly known as heath or heather plants. This classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic makeup. The family Ericaceae is a large and widespread group of plants, found in many parts of the world.
uses: Varasia squarrosa, commonly known as a species of flowering plant, has limited information available on its medicinal uses.
